Find P(A)
And
Find P(A|B)

求步驟解答


P(A)=1-(9/10)(8/9)(7/8)=P(B)

P(A or B)=1-(8/10)(7/9)(6/8)

P(A and B)=P(A)+P(B)-P(A or B)

P(A|B)=(P(A and B))/(P(B))

咁做得唔得？

r!(n-r)! over n!


event y
n=10 r=7

7/10x6/9x5/8...

p(x/y)=event x +event y
